name: Cala Escorxada
description: A remote, unspoilt cove with an end-of-the-world feel, fine sand and clear water, earned after a good walk. For travellers seeking solitude and landscape; no facilities whatsoever.

highlights: walk the Camí de Cavalls to an unspoilt 'end of the world' cove
swim in clean waters on a beach that is almost always quiet
go self-sufficient: no facilities, no shade and a long walk
